tiers.label: Bombs / Must Pick
tiers.description: Game-winning cards that provide overwhelming advantage the moment they hit the board.

cards.name: Aang, the Last Airbender
cards.reason: Ultimate tempo threat with Airbending protection and evasion.

cards.name: The Earth King
cards.reason: Massive anthem for Ally decks that makes combat impossible for opponents.

cards.name: Azula, Cunning Usurper
cards.reason: Punishes every play and draw, providing inevitable card advantage.

cards.name: Koh, the Face Stealer
cards.reason: Large evasive flyer that empties the opponent's hand upon entry.

cards.name: Bumi, Unleashed
cards.reason: Huge stats and Earthbending reach that closes games in one or two turns.

tiers.label: Premium / Strong Pick
tiers.description: High-tier uncommons and rares that define the best archetypes.

cards.name: Appa, Loyal Sky Bison
cards.reason: The best uncommon; high stats and evasion that wins through the air.

cards.name: Toph, the Blind Bandit
cards.reason: Premier Earthbending engine that creates continuous board pressure.

cards.name: Iroh, Grand Lotus
cards.reason: Consistent card advantage and synergy with Firebending spells.

cards.name: Master Pakku
cards.reason: Powerful Waterbend payoff that controls the battlefield.

cards.name: Suki, Kyoshi Leader
cards.reason: Elite Ally payoff that protects and buffs your entire team.

tiers.label: Good Playables
tiers.description: Strong synergy pieces and efficient removal for their respective colors.

cards.name: Water Tribe Rallier
cards.reason: Essential for Ally-based strategies to go wide.

cards.name: Messenger Hawk
cards.reason: Generates Clues and provides evasion for Skies archetypes.

cards.name: Agni Kai
cards.reason: Versatile removal that can act as a finisher in aggressive red decks.

cards.name: Mai, Jaded Edge
cards.reason: Efficient conditional removal with a relevant body for sacrifice decks.

tiers.label: Filler / Decent
tiers.description: Solid cards that fill the curve and support the main mechanics.

cards.name: Air Nomad Student
cards.reason: Standard aggressive 2-drop that fits into white aggro builds.

cards.name: Kyoshi Warriors
cards.reason: Good token generator for Ally or sacrifice synergies.

cards.name: Earth Rumble
cards.reason: Basic Earthbending enabler that provides reach in the late game.

tiers.label: Sideboard / Avoid
tiers.description: Cards that are either too situational or too weak for the main deck.

cards.name: Abandon Attachments
cards.reason: Strictly a sideboard card against heavy enchantment/artifact decks.

cards.name: Cabbage Merchant's Cart
cards.reason: Flavor card with negligible board impact and slow value.

cards.name: Secret of the Fire Nation
cards.reason: Too much setup required for a payoff that doesn't win the game.
